texto: He pointed to the right and left. We are unfree, all of us. Only, that does not absolve us of responsibility. Despite our lack of freedom we constantly make decisions and we have to take responsibility for them and their consequences. And so, with every decision we take we become less free.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Milena Michiko Flašar sobre temas ligados a vida. A afirmação “He pointed to the right and left. We are unfree, all of us. Only, that does not absolve us of res…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, free-will, freedom, útil em momentos de freedom e humanity.

texto: Today on the platform, surrounded by so many people, I asked myself whether I would miss any one of them if they weren't here, and then: Whether they would miss me if I weren't here. Whether we are not all somehow here in order to touch one another. When the train finally came and I saw my reflection in its windows and in the sleeping faces rolling by behind them, there was no question, only an insight: We must all, every one of us, relate to one another.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Milena Michiko Flašar sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Today on the platform, surrounded by so many people, I asked myself whether I would miss any one …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, connections, humanity, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e humanity.

texto: After he finished he said: If there is anything for you to learn, it's only that you should not be ashamed. Don't be ashamed to be a person with feelings. No matter what it is, feel it tenderly and deeply. Feel it more tenderly, feel it more deeply. Feel it for yourself. Feel it for others. And then: Let it go.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Milena Michiko Flašar sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “After he finished he said: If there is anything for you to learn, it's only that you should not b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, emotion, feelings, útil em momentos de termino e feelings.

texto: Can you hear me? Sighing. You were right. My requiem is well prepared. Still to be written is the poem that is never complete, an endless rubbing on the ink block, an endless dipping of the pen, an endless swoop over the white paper, the poem of my life. I will try to write it down. Soon, no, now, I will try. The first line. I called him Necktie. I will write: He taught me to see with eyes of feeling.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Milena Michiko Flašar que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Can you hear me? Sighing. You were right. My requiem is well prepared. Still to be written is the…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, humanity, inspiracional, com foco em inspiracao e termino.

texto: How come you're so different, I asked once, as we sat in the shade of the pine tree. Yukiko's answer, a sentence learned by heart: Because I fell from a star.
explicacao: Citação de Milena Michiko Flašar sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “How come you're so different, I asked once, as we sat in the shade of the pine tree. Yukiko's ans…” articula amor, individuality, vida em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como vida e love.
